title: hoya acuta var. citrina
intro: Hoya acuta var. citrina, also known as the citrine waxy pod orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Hoya acuta var. citrina include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
